name: HTS_STAFF_PLAN_GRID_CONFIGS
description: Table holding the Schedule Staffing Plan configuration used in the Staffing grids

columns.Name: PLAN_GRID_CONFIG_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key. Unique system generated identifier for a Staffing Plan Skills

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: PLAN_GRID_CONFIG_CODE
columns.Comments: Unique code entered when creating a Plan Grid configuration Code,

columns.Name: STAFF_PLAN_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to Staffing Plan table

columns.Name: STAFF_PLAN_GRID_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to Staffing Plan Grid table

columns.Name: STAFF_PLAN_JOB_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to Staffing Plan Job table

columns.Name: STAFF_PLAN_SKILL_ID
columns.Comments: Skill without Qualifications same as staffing plan jobs

columns.Name: APPLY_TO
columns.Comments: Indicates Calculation Type applies Job  or group

columns.Name: RATIO_STAFF_VALUE
columns.Comments: Staffing Value used to calculate the ratio

columns.Name: RATIO_SEGMENT_VOLUME
columns.Comments: Segment Volume used to calculate the ratio

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
